summary: Auth & Suggestions feature testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed after fixing admin suggestions endpoint auth. Frontend: All gated features work correctly - locked controls for non-logged users, auth modal opens on click, logged-in users have full access.

fixed.issue: verify_admin() was called incorrectly with Request object instead of using Depends()
fixed.fix: Changed to use dependencies=[Depends(verify_admin)] decorator pattern

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/register returns 400 for duplicate email
Backend: POST /api/auth/register returns 400 for short password (<6 chars)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login authenticates user and returns session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid password
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for non-existent user
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid session token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without session token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with invalid session token
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout clears session and invalidates token
Backend: POST /api/suggestions requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/suggestions creates field suggestion with valid token
Backend: POST /api/suggestions creates general suggestion with valid token
Backend: POST /api/suggestions returns 400 for invalid type
Backend: POST /api/suggestions returns 400 for empty text
Backend: GET /api/admin/suggestions returns 401/403 without admin token
Backend: GET /api/admin/suggestions returns suggestions list with admin token
Frontend (not logged in): 'Sign in' button visible in navbar
Frontend (not logged in): 'This Month' and 'All Time' period filters are greyed out with lock icon
Frontend (not logged in): 'Filter by tags' is greyed out with lock icon
Frontend (not logged in): 'Most Recent' and 'This Week' are accessible (not locked)
Frontend (not logged in): Clicking locked controls opens auth modal
Frontend (not logged in): 'Suggest' button visible next to categories
Frontend (not logged in): Clicking 'Suggest' opens auth modal
Frontend: Auth modal has Google login button and email/password form
Frontend: Auth modal toggle between 'Sign in' and 'Create account' works
Frontend: Email/password registration creates account and logs in user
Frontend (logged in): All period filters are accessible (no lock icons)
Frontend (logged in): 'Filter by tags' is accessible and opens tag panel
Frontend (logged in): User avatar/name shown in navbar
Frontend (logged in): Logout button visible
Frontend: Admin 'Suggestions' tab shows submitted suggestions with 'Mark reviewed' action
seed_data_creation: Created test user sessions for Playwright testing via mongosh
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified new auth (register/login/logout/me) and suggestions features. Backend admin suggestions endpoint was fixed (was using verify_admin incorrectly). Frontend gating works correctly - 'This Month', 'All Time', and 'Filter by tags' are locked with lock icons for non-logged users. Auth modal opens when clicking locked controls or 'Suggest' button when not logged in. Admin Suggestions tab shows all user submissions with field/general types and 'Mark reviewed' action.
